content.text:
I’m ready to help, but I don’t see the problem statement yet. Please share one of the following:

- The full problem statement (text), or
- A clear image/screenshot of the problem, or
- A concise description (what is given, what needs to be computed, input/output format, constraints, and a few sample tests)

If it’s a programming contest problem, also tell me:
- Your preferred language (Python, C++, Java, etc.)
- Any constraints (time/memory) I should aim for

What I’ll deliver once you share it:
- A high-level approach and proof of correctness
- An algorithm with complexity analysis
- Clean, well-commented code in your chosen language
- A few test cases (including edge cases) and explanation

If you can’t share the problem statement, you can still describe it (in your own words), and I’ll propose a structured plan and a concrete solution.
